datasetName: J.P. Morgan Asset Management 2025 Long-Term Capital Market Assumptions
section: 2025 Estimates and correlations | U.S. dollar assumptions
notes: This repository stores structured assumptions derived from the source report without redistributing the report PDFs.
Returns and volatilities are sourced from the report's U.S. dollar assumption matrix.
Correlation coverage is currently partial and should be expanded before claiming full matrix fidelity.
